overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a sci-fi RPG showing a character in a teal coat descending stairs and entering a futuristic spacecraft showroom. The environment features clean white and grey architecture with red carpet accents, holographic displays, and several NPCs browsing the exhibits.

scene_state.functional_zone: lobby entrance with stairs leading to showroom

agents.ego_description: walking down white marble stairs and across the red carpet toward the glass showroom entrance

entered.detail: short flight of white stairs with metal railings leading down from upper level
large curved glass enclosure with spacecraft visible inside
illuminated sign reading SHOW ROOM above the glass entrance
red accent wall with TAIYO ASTRONEERING logo and white text
red carpet runner leading from stairs to showroom entrance

segments.scene_description: The character descends a short white staircase into a lobby area featuring a prominent red carpet. Ahead lies a futuristic glass-enclosed showroom with illuminated signage, while a branded red wall for Taiyo Astroneering is visible to the right.

scene_state.functional_zone: futuristic spacecraft showroom with holographic displays

events.description: character walks through the glass entrance into the showroom interior

agents.ego_description: entering the showroom and walking past NPCs toward the central display desk at the back

notable_agents.action: standing with hands on hips near the entrance wearing a dark uniform
two workers in orange suits examining the display cases

entered.detail: large rectangular white desk with glowing surface and control interfaces
glowing blue holographic displays mounted on the curved walls
dark ribbed metallic wall panels curving around the showroom interior
black office chair positioned behind the central desk where an NPC is seated

segments.scene_description: The character enters the glass showroom, passing a uniformed NPC near the entrance and two workers in orange suits. Inside, curved metallic walls feature glowing holographic screens, and the character approaches a large central desk where another NPC is seated working at a console.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a character descends from a sterile lobby into the high-tech interior of a spacecraft showroom. It begins with the character walking down a short white staircase and across a prominent red carpet toward a glass-enclosed facility. As the camera moves forward, the scene shifts from the open lobby and a branded Taiyo Astroneering wall into the showroom, passing a uniformed NPC and workers in orange suits at the entrance. The environment then opens up into a space defined by curved metallic walls and glowing holographic screens before finally approaching a large central desk where an NPC works at a console.
